rationale: Both reviews surface the identical core scope violations (premature Layer 5/6 stubs with `True`/`IsUnipotent` placeholders before any Layers 0-5, plus the bundled `AffineAlgGroup` and naive nilpotence def) directly visible in the diff; acting on either produces the same better outcome of excising the out-of-scope endpoints (possibly after a Layer-0-only split), with Review 2's minor extra 'unit' framing not changing the resulting PR.
